_metadata.coverage: 22.2% of boilerplate fields already exist in registry

new_fields.label: Access Description
new_fields.notes: Description of property access and major arterials. Used in Location section. Example: 'The property fronts 109 Street with convenient connections to major arterials including 100th Street/Highway 4'

new_fields.label: Accessibility Rating
new_fields.notes: Overall accessibility rating for the site. Displayed in Site Details accessibility table.

new_fields.label: Assistance Provided Text
new_fields.defaultValue: No one provided real property appraisal assistance to the appraiser signing this certification. Assistance provided includes miscellaneous administrative assistance, such as file and exhibit preparation, as well as data entry relating to area descriptions and other routine front-half related duties.
new_fields.notes: Conditional field. If inspector provided, use inspector text with name/company. Otherwise use default 'No one provided assistance' text.

new_fields.label: Authorized Use
new_fields.notes: Purpose for which the report is authorized to be used. Typically 'first mortgage financing purposes' or 'acquisition purposes'.

new_fields.label: Authorized User
new_fields.notes: The only authorized user(s) of this report. Typically same as client-company. Auto-populated from client info.

new_fields.label: Number of Buildings
new_fields.notes: Total number of buildings on the property. Controls conditional logic for singular vs plural language. Example: 2 buildings = 'comprised of 2 total buildings'

new_fields.label: Net Rentable Area (SF)
new_fields.notes: Total Net Rentable Area in square feet. May be duplicate of 'total-nra' or 'impv-nra'. Verify if existing field can be used.

new_fields.label: Capitalization Rate
new_fields.notes: Cap rate used in Direct Capitalization method. Critical for value calculation. May be duplicate of 'calc-cap-rate'.

new_fields.label: City Name
new_fields.notes: City where property is located. May be duplicate of 'city' field. Used in narrative descriptions.

new_fields.label: Client Full Address
new_fields.notes: Complete client address including street, city, province, postal. Calculated from: client-address + client-city + client-province + client-postal. Example: '1901, 1088 - 6th Ave SW, Calgary, AB T2P 5N3'

new_fields.label: Client Contact Name
new_fields.notes: Full name of client contact person. Example: 'Kenneth Engler'. May be duplicate of 'client-contact-name'.

new_fields.label: Client Title
new_fields.notes: Job title of client contact. Example: 'CEO'. Optional field (can be blank).

new_fields.label: Contract Rent % of Market
new_fields.notes: Calculated: (Average Contract Rent / Average Market Rent) * 100. Used in Income Approach. Example: '85.3% of market rents'.

new_fields.label: Current Owner
new_fields.notes: Legal name of current property owner. Example: '102109845 Saskatchewan Ltd.'

new_fields.label: Demographics Description
new_fields.notes: Optional demographics paragraph for Location section. Include if available. Example: Population, median age, household income data.

new_fields.label: Effective Gross Revenue
new_fields.notes: Calculated: PGR - Vacancy Loss. May be duplicate of 'calc-egr'.

new_fields.label: Electrical System Description
new_fields.notes: Description of electrical system. Example: 'Individually metered'. May be duplicate of 'electrical' field.

new_fields.label: Exposure Description
new_fields.notes: Description of site exposure. Example: 'Exposure of the subject is average noting frontage on 109 Street & 11 Avenue'. May be duplicate of 'exposure-visibility'.

new_fields.label: Exposure Time Conclusion
new_fields.notes: Reasonable estimate of exposure and marketing time. Typically 'six months' for multi-family.

new_fields.label: Extraordinary Assumptions
new_fields.defaultValue: No Extraordinary Assumptions were made for this assignment.
new_fields.notes: Conditional field based on value-scenario-type. 'As If Renovated & Stabilized' scenarios include renovation assumptions. Others typically use default.

new_fields.label: Vacancy Allowance %
new_fields.notes: Vacancy allowance as percentage of PGR. Typically 2-5% for multi-family. May be duplicate of 'calc-vacancy-rate'.

new_fields.label: Foundation Type
new_fields.notes: Type of building foundation. May be duplicate of 'foundation' field.

new_fields.label: Frontage Streets
new_fields.notes: Streets on which property fronts. Example: '109 Street & 11 Avenue'

new_fields.label: H&B Use Scenario
new_fields.notes: Highest and Best Use scenario. Typically 'As Improved' for existing properties, 'As Proposed' for renovation scenarios.

new_fields.label: HVAC Description
new_fields.notes: Description of heating/cooling system. Example: 'Boilers with baseboard radiant heat'. May be duplicate of 'hvac' field.

new_fields.label: Hypothetical Conditions
new_fields.notes: CRITICAL CONDITIONAL FIELD. Content varies by value-scenario-type: 'As Stabilized' = full lease-up conditions, 'As If Renovated & Stabilized' = renovation + lease-up, 'As Is' = minimal conditions.

new_fields.label: Include Demographics Section
new_fields.notes: Boolean flag to control whether demographics paragraph is included in Location section.

new_fields.label: Inspection Date
new_fields.notes: Date property was inspected. Can be single date or multiple dates. Example: 'October 17, 2025' or 'November 28, 2025 and January 25, 2022'

new_fields.label: Inspector Provided
new_fields.notes: Boolean flag. If true, use inspector assistance text. If false, use 'No one provided assistance' text.

new_fields.label: Insulation Type
new_fields.notes: Type of building insulation. Standard default for walkup apartments.

new_fields.label: Lighting
new_fields.notes: Lighting description. Standard default for multi-family.

new_fields.label: Map Files
new_fields.notes: Array of map image paths (regional, local, aerial, site plans, zoning). May already exist as individual img-map-* fields.

new_fields.label: Market Name
new_fields.notes: Primary market name. Example: 'North Battleford'. May be duplicate of 'market' field.

new_fields.label: Market Overview Text
new_fields.notes: Rich text field for market context and economic overview. Completely property/market-specific content.

new_fields.label: Market Rent per SF
new_fields.notes: Average concluded market rent per square foot. May be duplicate of 'calc-avg-rent-per-sf'.

new_fields.label: Market Rent per Unit
new_fields.notes: Average concluded market rent per unit. May be duplicate of 'calc-avg-rent-per-unit'.

new_fields.label: Nearby Schools
new_fields.notes: Optional list of nearby schools. Include if available. May be duplicate of 'nearby-schools' field.

new_fields.label: Net Operating Income
new_fields.notes: Calculated: EGR - Operating Expenses. May be duplicate of 'calc-noi'.

new_fields.label: NOI per SF
new_fields.notes: Net Operating Income per square foot. May be duplicate of 'calc-noi-per-sf'.

new_fields.label: NOI per Unit
new_fields.notes: Net Operating Income per unit. May be duplicate of 'calc-noi-per-unit'.

new_fields.label: Net Rentable Area (SF)
new_fields.notes: Total Net Rentable Area. May be duplicate of 'total-nra' or 'impv-nra'.

new_fields.label: Occupancy Percentage
new_fields.notes: Current occupancy as percentage. Example: 100.0% or 91.7%. May be duplicate of 'occupancy-rate'.

new_fields.label: Operating Expenses per SF
new_fields.notes: Total operating expenses per square foot. Calculated from total expenses / NRA.

new_fields.label: Operating Expenses per Unit
new_fields.notes: Total operating expenses per unit. Calculated from total expenses / unit count.

new_fields.label: Pending Sale
new_fields.notes: Boolean flag. If true, include pending sale details in sales history. If false, use 'We are unaware of any pending sales...' text.

new_fields.label: Photo Captions
new_fields.notes: Array of photo descriptions/captions. May already exist as individual img-*-caption fields.

new_fields.label: Photo Files
new_fields.notes: Array of photo file paths. May already exist as individual img-* fields.

new_fields.label: Potential Gross Revenue
new_fields.notes: Total rental revenue + other income. May be duplicate of 'calc-pgr'.

new_fields.label: Property Address Line 1
new_fields.notes: First line of property address. Example: '1101, 1121 109 St'. May be duplicate of 'street-address'.

new_fields.label: Property Address Line 2
new_fields.notes: Second line of property address. Example: 'North Battleford, Saskatchewan'. Calculated from city + province.

new_fields.label: Property Address
new_fields.notes: Combined property address. May be duplicate of multiple existing fields.

new_fields.label: City, Province
new_fields.notes: Combined city and province. Example: 'North Battleford, Saskatchewan'. Calculated from city + province.

new_fields.label: Property City
new_fields.notes: City where property is located. May be duplicate of 'city' field.

new_fields.label: Full Property Address
new_fields.notes: Complete property address including street, city, province. Calculated field.

new_fields.label: Property Province
new_fields.notes: Province where property is located. May be duplicate of 'province' field.

new_fields.label: Roof Type
new_fields.notes: Type of roof. Example: 'Flat built up membrane' or 'Asphalt shingles'. May be duplicate of 'roof' field.

new_fields.label: Sales History Details
new_fields.defaultValue: We are unaware of any pending sales or listing activity relating to the subject property.
new_fields.notes: Sales history narrative. If pending-sale = true, include sale details. Otherwise use default text.

new_fields.label: Scenario Description
new_fields.notes: Brief description of value scenario. Example: 'which at the time of inspection represents the improved property as of the effective date and leased up at market rental rates and operating costs'. Varies by value-scenario-type.

new_fields.label: Security Features
new_fields.notes: Security features description. Standard default for walkup apartments. May be duplicate of 'security' field.

new_fields.label: Site Area (Acres)
new_fields.notes: Site area in acres. May be duplicate of 'site-acreage'.

new_fields.label: Site Area (SF)
new_fields.notes: Site area in square feet. May be duplicate of 'site-total-area'.

new_fields.label: Site Area Source
new_fields.notes: Source of site area measurement. Example: 'ICS' or 'Client' or 'Survey'.

new_fields.label: Number of Stories
new_fields.notes: Number of stories/floors. Example: 2 or 3. May be duplicate of 'stories' or 'impv-stories'.

new_fields.label: Submarket Name
new_fields.notes: Submarket or neighborhood name. May be duplicate of 'submarket' field.

new_fields.label: Total Operating Expenses
new_fields.notes: Sum of all operating expense categories. May be duplicate of 'calc-expenses-total'.

new_fields.label: Public Transit Description
new_fields.notes: Description of public transit access. Example: 'Local bus service operates on nearby corridors...'. May be duplicate of 'public-transit'.

new_fields.label: Unit Count
new_fields.notes: Total number of units. May be duplicate of 'total-units' or 'impv-num-units'.

new_fields.label: Unit Rent Discussion
new_fields.notes: Property-specific analysis of unit rents and market positioning. Rich text field for Income Approach section.

new_fields.label: Vacancy Percentage
new_fields.notes: Vacancy allowance percentage. May be duplicate of 'financial-vacancy-percent' or 'calc-vacancy-rate'.

new_fields.label: Value Scenario Type
new_fields.notes: CRITICAL FIELD. Controls conditional content for hypothetical conditions, extraordinary assumptions, and H&B Use scenario. May be duplicate of 'value-scenario'.

new_fields.label: Value Scenarios List
new_fields.notes: Formatted list of value scenarios. Example: 'As Stabilized (Fee Simple Estate)' or 'As Is (Fee Simple Estate) and As If Renovated & Stabilized (Fee Simple Estate)'. Calculated from value-scenario-type.

new_fields.label: Walk/Bike/Transit Scores
new_fields.notes: Description of walkability, bikeability, and transit scores. Example: 'Walk Score around 60, Transit Score near 35, Bike Score around 55'.

new_fields.label: Year Built (Weighted)
new_fields.notes: Weighted average year built for properties with multiple buildings of different ages. Optional field.

new_fields.label: Year Built
new_fields.notes: Year property was built. May be duplicate of existing 'year-built' field.

new_fields.label: Zoning Change Statement
new_fields.defaultValue: No zoning change is believed to be imminent.
new_fields.notes: Statement about likelihood of zoning changes. Typically 'No zoning change is believed to be imminent.' or 'A zoning change for the subject does not appear likely.'.

new_fields.label: Zoning Code
new_fields.notes: Zoning district code. Example: 'R2' or 'ND'. May be part of 'zoning-classification'.

new_fields.label: Zoning Description
new_fields.notes: Full description of zoning district. May be duplicate of existing 'zoning-description' field.

new_fields.label: Zoning District Name
new_fields.notes: Full name of zoning district. Example: 'Low Density Residential District (R2)' or 'Neighbourhood District (ND)'.
